_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in identifying organizational and project-level AI risks, including AI security risks and requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI systems, attack surface analysis, and control gap identification.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-002 (AG, cosine: 0.703), AG-K-010 (AG, cosine: 0.696).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.2/10 (raw 0.719). Shared vocabulary: [ai, security, skill]. DCWF-only terms [identifying, level, organizational, project, requirements, risks] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control, gap] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.911 (P=0.918, R=0.904). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in identifying organizational and project-level AI risks, including AI sec" and "Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI sy" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.728 ≈ STS 0.719 (gap 0.009). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, security, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 25.0%. Shared tokens: [ai, security, skill]. DCWF-only: [identifying, level, organizational, project, requirements, risks]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control, gap].
